description: Verify custom digital employees can be created, routed, disabled, restored, archived, and permanently deleted with history-preserving audit records.

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system scripts profiles SOUL.md "$tmp/"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; office="$tmp/agent-system/bin/office-system"; router="$tmp/scripts/agent-router"; "$office" agent-create --agent contract-writer --display-name 'Contract Writer' --role-description 'Drafts plain-language commercial contracts' --template writer --skill verification-loop --keyword contract --requested-by owner-1 --role owner --confirmed > "$tmp/created.json"; HERMES_HOME="$tmp" "$router" --agent contract-writer --route-json 'draft this contract' > "$tmp/routed.json"; "$office" agent-status --agent contract-writer --status inactive --requested-by owner-1 --role owner --confirmed > "$tmp/inactive.json"; set +e; HERMES_HOME="$tmp" "$router" --agent contract-writer --route-json 'draft this contract' >/dev/null 2>&1; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; "$office" agent-status --agent contract-writer --status active --requested-by owner-1 --role owner --confirmed > "$tmp/restored.json"; "$office" agent-status --agent contract-writer --status archived --requested-by owner-1 --role owner --confirmed > "$tmp/archived.json"; "$office" agent-delete --agent contract-writer --requested-by owner-1 --role owner --confirmed > "$tmp/deleted.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys,pathlib; created=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); routed=json.load(open(sys.argv[2])); deleted=json.load(open(sys.argv[3])); reg=json.load(open(sys.argv[4])); audit=pathlib.Path(sys.argv[5]).read_text(); assert created["status"]=="active" and created["origin"]=="custom"; assert routed["agent"]=="contract-writer"; assert deleted["status"]=="deleted" and deleted["history_preserved"] is True; assert "contract-writer" not in reg["agents"] and reg["tombstones"][-1]["agent_id"]=="contract-writer"; assert "agent_created" in audit and "agent_deleted" in audit' "$tmp/created.json" "$tmp/routed.json" "$tmp/deleted.json" "$tmp/agent-system/settings/custom-agents.registry.json" "$tmp/agent-system/logs/audit-events.jsonl"
